name: brooks-lint
description: AI code reviews grounded in twelve classic engineering books — decay risk diagnostics with book citations, severity labels, and six analysis modes (PR review, architecture audit, tech debt, test quality, health dashboard, full-sweep auto-fix)

interface.shortDescription: AI code reviews grounded in twelve classic engineering books
interface.longDescription: AI-powered code quality diagnosis grounded in twelve classic software engineering books (The Mythical Man-Month, A Philosophy of Software Design, Refactoring, and more). Produces decay-risk findings in Iron Law form — Symptom → Source → Consequence → Remedy — with book citations, severity labels, and six analysis modes: PR review, architecture audit, tech debt assessment, test quality review, health dashboard, and full-sweep auto-fix.
